sentence.chinese: 山是獵人的大地，海是漁人的蒼天。山有情，海有義。山造就了勇士，海造就了能者。
sentence.ab: O omah no mi’adopay ko lotok, o kakarayan no mifutingay ko riyal, ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecelay a faloco’ no riyal. O lotok ko palafa’inayay to tamdaw, o riyal ko palowaday to inanengay a tamdaw.

sentence.chinese: 山有情，海有義。山造就了勇士，海造就了能者。
sentence.ab: Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecelay no riyal. O lotok ko palafa’inayay to tamdaw, o riyal ko patirengay to sakainaneng no tamdaw.

sentence.chinese: 勇士之箭捕獲了獵物，能者之網捕獲了海中的魚。
sentence.ab: Citama’ ko pana’ no tadafa’inayan, makafoting ko salil no inanengay to foting no riyal.

sentence.chinese: 習武的少年，在山中追逐，征服人性的懦弱。
sentence.ab: O nipakontaway a kapah, malalepelepel i lotolotokan, mico’is a mirefa’ to pinangan no tamdamdaw.

sentence.chinese: 山有情，海有義。山使獵人有智慧，海使漁人變聰明。
sentence.ab: Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecelay a faloco’ no riyal. Maparocek no lotok to taneng ko mi’adopay, maparocek no riyal to sakacipono’ no mifotinay.

sentence.chinese: 習武的少年，在山中頓悟。健美的少女，在海中釋懷。山不咆哮，海不怒吼。
sentence.ab: O minanamay to kontaw a kapah, matalipa’elal i lotok, o tanohtohay a kaying; mahedal ko faloco’ i riyal. Cowa pilekal ko lotok, cowa kapo’i ko riyal.

sentence.chinese: 山是我們的能量，海是我們的泉源。山是獵人的大地，海是漁人的蒼天。
sentence.ab: O sakaci’icel no mita ko lotok, o nemnem no mita ko riyal. O omah no mi’adopay ko lotok, o kakarayan no mifotingay ko riyal.

sentence.chinese: 山有情，海有義。曾幾何時？生活改變，文明向前邁進。
sentence.ab: Ira ko faloco’ no lotok, ira ko moecelay no riyal. Kihacowaan to hakiya? Mafalic to ko nika’orip a milakowit to saka’orip.

sentence.chinese: 人群人潮前往山中，邁向海洋遊玩。山流淚，海哭泣。族人迷惘，族人失落。
sentence.ab: Masakapokapot a masafelefeleng ko tamdaw, pasayra i lotok, milawat a pasayra i riyal a misalama. Cilosa’ ko lotok, tomangic ko riyal. Maolat ko finawlan, masemer ko finawlan. Nawhani?

sentence.chinese: 習武的少年在人山中流浪，健美的少女在人海中沉浮漂流。先祖對山與海的呼喚，依舊未破碎。
sentence.ab: Mirarakat i lotolotokan koya nipakontaway a kapah, mapawpaw a makidkid no tamdamdaw koya tanohtohay a kaying. Tahidanganto no lotok ato riyal ko liteng, oyananto cowa kalasawad.

sentence.chinese: 美少年，美少女啊！記得歸來唷！當你仰望時，山依在，海在流。
sentence.ab: Tanestesay a kapah, tanohetohay a kaying! Haratengen ko pinokayan yo! Toya pica’engaw iso i, oyananto a mitadi’ec ko lotok, oyato a mafelocay ko riyal.

sentence.chinese: 娜魯灣呀！山是我們的大地，吼依呀嗨啊！海是我們的蒼天。吼依呀嗨啊！
sentence.ab: Nalowan! O lotok o omah no mita. Ho-iya-hay-yan, o riyal o kakarayan no mita. Ho-iya-ha-hay.
